item.title: INFRA: Error Presentation System
item.intent: Every error the user sees must be designed — human-readable, non-modal, recoverable. No raw error codes, no unhandled states.
item.description: Per D-ERR-1 and DP-8. Centralized error presentation layer: non-modal banners for recoverable errors (save failure, network timeout), modal alerts only for data-loss-risk scenarios (file deleted while editing). All error messages are human-written, not technical. Every error includes a recovery action (retry, save elsewhere, dismiss). Error states designed per feature: file I/O errors, AI model errors, network errors, permission errors.
acceptanceCriteria: All error messages are human-readable with no raw error codes or technical jargon
Recoverable errors appear as non-modal banners with retry action
Data-loss-risk errors appear as modal alerts with save/recovery options
No unhandled error state produces a blank screen or crash
